recommendedArchitectures.label: The One Dinner Approach
recommendedArchitectures.marketingHook: The app that ends the 'what's for dinner' argument.
recommendedArchitectures.tikTokAngle: How we eat the exact same dinner, but he gains muscle and I lose weight.

recommendedArchitectures.label: The Two Plates Approach
recommendedArchitectures.marketingHook: Plan meals together without the mental load.
recommendedArchitectures.tikTokAngle: Stop doing macro math for two people.

recommendedArchitectures.label: The PairPlate Approach
recommendedArchitectures.tagline: One dinner. Two plates. Both perfect.
recommendedArchitectures.tikTokAngle: Two goals. One dinner. Zero arguments.

nameCandidates.name: One Dinner
nameCandidates.notes: Directly communicates adaptive cooking moat. Short, memorable.

nameCandidates.name: Two Plates
nameCandidates.notes: Visual, memorable, instantly communicates the concept. Perfect for TikTok demos.

nameCandidates.name: PairPlate
nameCandidates.notes: Compound word, brandable. 'Pair' = couples, 'Plate' = food + portions. Good for App Store.

nameCandidates.name: Cook Two
nameCandidates.tagline: Cook for two. Optimize for both.
nameCandidates.notes: Action-oriented. Both .com and .app available to register fresh.

nameCandidates.name: Feed
nameCandidates.notes: Dual meaning. Short. .com $750K aftermarket. Not viable.

eliminatedNames.name: WeCook
eliminatedNames.reason: 3+ active entities (meal delivery, AI meal planning, food marketplace)

eliminatedNames.name: OurPlate
eliminatedNames.reason: Direct competitor — ourplate.app is live couples meal planning

eliminatedNames.name: DuoDine
eliminatedNames.reason: Direct competitor — duodine.com.au is live couples app

eliminatedNames.name: KitchenSync
eliminatedNames.reason: Multiple active entities (restaurant accounting + grocery app + trademark)

eliminatedNames.name: WePlan
eliminatedNames.reason: Trademark filings exist in Spain and China

eliminatedNames.name: SplitPlate
eliminatedNames.reason: Direct competitor — splitplate.app/.ai — same 'one meal, two portion sizes' concept

eliminatedNames.name: Plateful
eliminatedNames.reason: Multiple conflicts — pl8ful.com, Google Play app, plateful.ai

eliminatedNames.name: PlateMate
eliminatedNames.reason: Conflict exists — platematesapp.com — 'One Meal, Two Ways' couples app

adaptiveCooking.text: One recipe. Two plates. Both perfect.
One shared prep. Two distinct plates.
Same groceries. Same dinner prep. Different portions.

painPoint.text: The app that ends the 'what's for dinner' argument.

No more 'I don't know, what do you want?'
Stop doing macro math for two people.

relationshipFirst.text: Dinner should bring you together, not start an argument.
The app that feeds your relationship.

actionOriented.text: Stop planning dinner. Start enjoying it.
You cook together. We'll do the math.
Plan once. Eat well all week.
The thinking is done. Just cook.

pantryFirst.text: Cook what you have. Not what you don't.
The app that turns your fridge into a menu.
Stop buying more. Start cooking what you have.

topAngles.angle: The app that ends the 'what's for dinner' argument

brandingPrinciples.languageRule: Use 'We' instead of 'You' throughout the entire app
brandingPrinciples.emotionalFraming: You are selling marital harmony, time-saving, and stress relief — the food is just the medium.
uxPrinciples: No 'diet app' aesthetics — no neon colors, rigid speedometers, harsh red/green macro charts
Design for home — warm tones, soft typography, natural language
Frame notifications as nudges: 'Alex suggested Tacos for tonight. Approve?'
Feel like a shared digital kitchen, not a medical chart
App language: 'Our Shopping List', 'Our Kitchen', 'What Should We Cook?', 'Who Are You Cooking For?'

competitorTaglines.tagline: Stop carrying the mental load of meal planning alone
One cooking session — two plates tailored to each of you
Meal Planning That Brings Couples Together
Plan meals together with your partner!
The meal planning app for couples who love cooking together
Meal planning for couples with different goals
The Personalized Recipe & Cooking Companion for Couples
Plan dinners together with your favorite recipes, faster
The best way to organize your grocery shopping and recipe collection
